title: Fix YouTube video embedding in BNHS Hymn section

requirements.text: Fix the YouTube video embedding functionality in the BNHS Hymn section so that when a YouTube link (e.g., https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3gPb2XoQ2ug) is pasted into the external link field in BNHS Hymn Management, the video displays and plays correctly on the public BNHS Hymn page

quotes: example the BNHS hymn I upload on the YouTube Channel there's the external link there I paste or place the link then it doesn't work
when I paste this link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3gPb2XoQ2ug doesn't work?
video doesn't display correctly or need any troubleshooting

acceptanceCriteria: YouTube links in standard format (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID) are properly converted to embeddable format
YouTube links in short format (https://youtu.be/VIDEO_ID) are properly converted to embeddable format
The video displays correctly on the public BNHS Hymn page after saving
The video auto-plays with sound after the configured 3-second delay
No changes are made to other existing functionality or pages

requirements.text: Ensure the YouTube embed player is configured to allow autoplay with sound and includes proper error handling for videos that cannot be embedded due to privacy settings or embed restrictions
acceptanceCriteria: YouTube embed uses parameters that enable autoplay with sound (autoplay=1&mute=0)
Clear error message is displayed if a video cannot be embedded (privacy restrictions, embedding disabled)
The system gracefully handles edge cases like invalid YouTube URLs

constraints: Do not modify any other pages, components, or functionality beyond the BNHS Hymn video embedding
Do not change the backend implementation
Preserve the existing 3-second auto-play delay behavior
Maintain the existing admin interface for BNHS Hymn Management
nonGoals: Changing the upload video from device functionality
Modifying the overall layout or design of the BNHS Hymn page
Adding support for other video platforms beyond YouTube
Changing any other video-related features on the site
